blocks.text: AUDIT AND REFACTOR: Read the entire codebase. Find and fix ALL bugs, compilation errors, and warnings. Refactor messy code. Ensure all tests pass (cargo test). Ensure the project compiles clean (cargo build). Look for: terminal state corruption, file operation race conditions, memory leaks, unwrap() abuse, path traversal risks. Make it production-ready for v1.0. Commit your changes with descriptive messages. Report back what you found and fixed.
